Name: Xcode project setup (iOS 26.4 target)
Description:
Xcode project with auto-synced file group, Swift 5, iOS 26.4 deployment target.

Acceptance:
- Project builds for iOS Simulator + physical device
- New files auto-included via PBXFileSystemSynchronizedRootGroup

Estimate: S
Dependencies: none

Name: Design system (Theme.swift)

Central color palette, typography helpers, currency formatter.

- Color(hex:) extension works
- baht() formatter returns '฿1,234'
- serif(size:) helper renders Instrument Serif with system fallback

Estimate: S

Name: Data models (Station + Connector)
Description:
Codable/Identifiable/Hashable models + sample data for 4 stations.

Acceptance:
- Station.all returns sample stations
- Station.find(_:) lookup by id
- Connector.isDrone flag works

Estimate: S

Name: Router + shared components
Description:
ObservableObject router, CardView, Pill, StationCardView, TopNav, PrimaryCTA, DroneGlyph, etc.

Acceptance:
- Router.goto(_:stationId:) animates transitions
- All 8+ shared components reusable across screens

Name: Port 9 screens from Claude Design to SwiftUI
Description:
Onboarding, Map, Search, Station Detail, Booking, Payment, Active Charging, Profile, Trip History.

Acceptance:
- All screens pixel-match original design
- Thai-first copy throughout
- Animations (pager dots, ring, bottom sheet drag) working

Estimate: XL

Name: Build verification (Simulator + device)
Description:
Verify clean builds on generic iOS Simulator and iPhone 17 Pro (iOS 26.4).

Acceptance:
- No compile errors/warnings
- xcodebuild returns BUILD SUCCEEDED for both destinations

Estimate: S

Name: Define REST API contract (OpenAPI spec)
Description:
Document all endpoints: stations (list/detail/availability), bookings (create/cancel/status), users, payments, trip history.

Acceptance:
- openapi.yaml covers all 9 screens' data needs
- Request/response schemas match Station/Connector models
- Error responses standardized (code + message + i18n key)
- Document auth header requirements

Estimate: M
Blocks: all other M1 tasks

Name: Networking layer (URLSession + async/await + Codable)
Description:
Build APIClient with typed endpoints, auth header injection, retry, request cancellation.

Acceptance:
- APIClient.request(_:) generic over Decodable
- Handles 401 → triggers re-auth
- Timeouts + exponential backoff retry (3 attempts)
- Unit tests cover happy path + error paths

Estimate: M
Dependencies: API contract

Name: Replace sample Station.all with API
Description:
Wire MapScreenView and related views to fetch from /stations endpoint instead of Station.all hard-coded array.

Acceptance:
- Map + station cards populate from API
- Loading/error/empty states implemented
- Pull-to-refresh on station list

Estimate: M
Dependencies: Networking layer

Name: Real-time station availability polling
Description:
Poll /stations/:id/availability every 30s when detail screen is visible; stop on disappear.

Acceptance:
- AvailDot updates without manual refresh
- Polling pauses when app backgrounds
- No retain cycles (verified with Instruments)

Estimate: M

Name: Local cache with SwiftData
Description:
Persist stations + user trips so app works briefly offline and cold-starts instantly.

Acceptance:
- Stations cached on successful fetch
- TTL 10 min for availability, 24h for static fields
- Cache invalidation on manual refresh

Estimate: L
Dependencies: Networking layer

Name: Error handling + user-facing error UI
Description:
Global error banner + inline retry buttons. All API errors mapped to user-friendly Thai copy.

- 4xx errors show descriptive message
- 5xx errors show 'ลองใหม่' with exponential backoff

Estimate: M
